sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71460" key="canqo/xrws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξανθό-χρως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <sense id="n71460.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">brown,</tr_> of fried fish, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0478.tlg001:2:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nausicr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
